cloud_approach: Cloud-agnostic; prefer LocalStack for demos and MinIO for S3-compatible storage
constraints: No cluster-grade orchestration in this 10-day sprint
Limited admin rights on corporate laptops; prefer containerized labs
Avoid GUI-heavy tools; prefer CLI-first instructions
Focus on practical, command-driven labs that fit within 90 minutes per day

evaluation_preferences.proof_of_work: Commands run and artifacts committed to a dedicated onboarding branch in the monorepo
evaluation_preferences.acceptance: Lightweight PRs with passing CI and short demos (under 5 minutes) at the end of each day
